'''Calum Turner''' (born 29 April 1999) is an English professional [[rugby league]] player who plays as a {{rlp|fb}} who is currently a free agent. 

He has previously played for the [[Castleford Tigers]] in the [[Super League]], and was on loan from [[Castleford Tigers|Castleford]] at [[Featherstone Rovers]] in the [[2019 Betfred Championship]].<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/featherstone/calum-turner-joins-featherstone-rovers-on-loan-from-castleford-tigers-1-9565281 |title=Calum Turner joins Featherstone Rovers on loan from Castleford Tigers - Yorkshire Evening Post |website=Yorkshire Evening Post |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190203131957/https://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/featherstone/calum-turner-joins-featherstone-rovers-on-loan-from-castleford-tigers-1-9565281 |archive-date=3 February 2019}}</ref>

==Playing career==
===Castleford Tigers===
In 2018, he made his [[Super League]] début for the [[Castleford Tigers|Tigers]] against [[Hull F.C.|Hull FC]].<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/43966832|title=Super League: Hull FC 36-12 Castleford Tigers|publisher=BBC Sport}}</ref>

===Featherstone Rovers===
On 21 November 2024, it was reported that he had signed for [[Featherstone Rovers|Featherstone]] in the RFL Championship on a one-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|website=Featherstone Rovers|date=21 November 2024|title=Calum Turner joins Rovers for 2025|url=https://featherstonerovers.co.uk/calum-turner-joins-rovers-for-2025/}}</ref>
